channel.title: FPT Software Co., Ltd. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by FPT Software Co., Ltd. (fsoft).

image.title: FPT Software Co., Ltd. — recent CVEs

item.title: CVE-2026-6179 · 6.3 MEDIUM — Stored Cross Site Scripting in NightWolf Penetration Testing Platform
item.description: Stored Cross Site Scripting in NightWolf Penetration Testing Platform allows attack trigger and run malicious script in user's browser

item.title: CVE-2025-3014 · 8.3 HIGH — Insecure direct object references (IDOR) in NightWolf Penetration Platform
item.description: Insecure Direct Object References (IDOR) in access control in Tracking 2.1.4 on NightWolf Penetration Testing allows an attacker to access via manipulating request parameters or object references.

item.title: CVE-2025-3013 · 8.3 HIGH — Insecure direct object references (IDOR) in NightWolf Penetration Platform
item.description: Insecure Direct Object References (IDOR) in access control in Customer Portal before 2.1.4 on NightWolf Penetration Testing allows an attacker to access via manipulating request parameters or object references.

item.title: CVE-2025-31165 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Cross Site Scripting in NightWolf Penetration Platform
item.description: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the Logbug module of NightWolf Penetration Testing Platform 1.2.2 allows attackers to execute JavaScript through the markdown editor feature.
